docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WARD, COLIN AS TO DEFENDANT SMYTHE, FIONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICCE 76.57 SERVED APR-07-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMYTHE, FIONA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARD, COLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMYTHE, FIONA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $151.57 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,151.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SMYTHE, FIONA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
